project.name: 知识库管理系统 - 重新设计
project.styleDefinitionBrief: 企业级知识库管理系统界面，蓝色主色调(#3B7DDD)，干净克制的工具型界面，紧凑但不拥挤的布局节奏
project.designRead: B2B SaaS dashboard / 内部知识管理用户 / calm enterprise trust / medium density / avoid overly playful decorative elements

privateRegions: main content area with cards grid

pages.title: 知识库管理
pages.visualNorthStar: Left sidebar navigation with clean card grid in main content area, enterprise-grade knowledge management interface

continuityAnchors.colorSystem: Blue primary #3B7DDD, light gray #F0F2F5 background, white elevated surfaces
continuityAnchors.shapeSystem: 8-12px border radius on cards and containers, clean rectangular layout
continuityAnchors.typographySystem: System sans-serif font stack, clear hierarchy from 24px page title to 13px secondary text
continuityAnchors.componentLanguage: Card-based layout with subtle borders, clean iconography, text-based action buttons
